<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 2000; 250; 1500; 9001; 18624
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Improved Handling; Thermal Vision; High Tech Armory; 24 Karat Gatling Gun
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 15184753790; 15184753514; 15184753289; 15184752970
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS does not consider rev-up time.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{|class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev-Up Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.125 || 0.8 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1  || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.1 || 0.8 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.1 || 0.8 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.1 || 0.6 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 17 || 0.09 || 0.6 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
